⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.

tool_of_day.title: Wan-AI/Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B
tool_of_day.summary: A large language model with 1.3B parameters.

hot_take: The AI industry is facing growing scrutiny over the use of large language models, with ArXiv taking a stand against careless use and OpenAI shaking up its product strategy.
